title: Bread Optimized
body:
Bread Optimized focuses on being as lightweight as possible while optimizing the game as much as possible! :D

Bread Optimized also includes features like Dark Mode, Dynamic Lights & Distant Horizons! :3

Enjoy minecraft without it looking like a slide show! :0

I created this pack because I just wanted a really simple optimation modpack with some extra features like Shaders & The Distant Horizons mod. You can expect lightweight & simple optimation from this modpack! :)
